title: CORATED Toddler Toothbrush U-Shaped Kids Toothbrush Baby Soft Silicone Toothbrush Manual Training Toothbrush Infant 360° Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Kids 2-7 Years Old (Doughnut Brown)
features: 【SAFETY MATERIAL】Different from ordinary toothbrushes, U-shaped toothbrushes use safe food-grade silicone material, which is soft and comfortable, has no peculiar smell, and without BPA. Mothers are more at ease to protect the baby's oral health.

【360° EFFECTIVE CLEANING】The unique U-shaped toothbrush head design is more suitable for Toddler's tooth structure. It fits each tooth perfectly and provides adequate cleaning and protection for your child's teeth.

【FUN&CUTE TOOTHBRUSH】The cute rainbow and doughnut patterns, and the creative U-shaped toothbrush make it easy and fun for children to brush their teeth. This helps your child be willing to brush their teeth longer and even develop healthy brushing habits, say goodbye to tooth decay.

【EXTRA SOFT TOOTHBRUSH】The silicone bristles is soft on children's teeth and gums, clean teeth gently and massage baby’s delicate gums. The Soft brush head help get into hard to reach areas and effectively and remove stains.

【EASY TO USE】Squeeze toothpaste on the both side of the baby's toothbrush and put the kids toothbrush into baby's mouth, Swing it left to right, in 60 seconds finished the brushing. This package comes with 1 silicone toothbrush and 1 replacement silicone brush head, it is recommended to replace the brush head every 1 month. Toothbrush size: 85mm/3.35", Brush head size: 1.96"*0.98". Specially designed for the teeth of toddlers aged 2-7.

reviews.title: Nifty toothbrush, brush all the teeth at once
reviews.text:
Just add toothpaste, stick in mouth and brush side to side. Gets all the teeth clean at the same time. Very nifty. The brush head is a little flexible, so it can adjust to her jaw shape. I think the only thing that concerns me is that this is not really teaching the kid how to brush with a regular toothbrush. For now, it's really useful since she gets impatient with brushing teeth.
It came with a spare brush head which just pops on to the small metal rod. It's also very cute.

reviews.title: Simple and easy to use
reviews.text: This little toothbrush is pretty cheap in comparison to others similar to it, but it also doesn’t have any special functions. It just works as is, you put tooth paste between the bristles and then it’s used manually. No vibrations or flashing colors, but it does have a super cute design and hey at least it doesn’t need to be charged because those cords always seem to get lost too lol. Great price point for a bit more of a detailed, deep clean for kiddos’ teeth. Recommend!

reviews.title: I just got it so I can't comment on durability, but...
reviews.text: This is much less expensive than Oral B brush heads. I contacted Oral B to tell them I thought their brush heads are exorbitantly priced, but they blamed it on supply chain issues. So apparently Milos is somehow not affected by supply chain issues. It kinda makes it seem like Oral B's response was B.S. Anyway, these heads I bought fit my Oral B ProHealth toothbrush. It's kind of weird that the bristles aren't all flush with one another, but they seem to work fine. I don't care that the colors don't match with the toothbrush body.

reviews.title: Fits on finger well & easy to use!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:43eb444c7fc5734c88e2c00c67e2f0fc]] Ordered these to brush my kids teeth. They help simplify the process of trying with a regular tooth brush at this time. Fits on fingers well. Soft and gentle on gums snd helps get teeth clean. Im satisfied.

reviews.title: Not great for biters!
reviews.text: It’s soft and that’s great for him but not great for my fingers! Use carefully 😂

reviews.title: Not for little babies
reviews.text: I can’t even fit these in my baby’s mouth. Maybe for when he gets older but by the time they’d fit, he’d be using a toothbrush

reviews.title: Perfect...For My Cats. :))
reviews.text: My vet advised me to brush my cats' teeth at least 3x a week. They haven't liked the typical toothbrushes used for this, so I decided to try these. They tolerate these brushes really well and even seem to enjoy the "massage" these brushes give them. I have two cats so it was great that these came in a two-pack so each gets their own toothbrush. They work well with the "cat toothpaste" I use and I haven't had any issues with the little silicone bristles coming off like the bristles on other types of toothbrushes. It slips over my finger and fits perfectly - just snug enough that I have good control, which is imperative for brushing pet teeth, and it also gives some protection in case of biting. This hasn't been an issue for me, since my cats are young and are used to having their teeth brushed at this point. The key to successful tooth brushing for cats is starting slow and being consistent. Glad to have found these, because they really do make the process a lot easier and I'm able to get the job done a lot faster and with less fuss from my fur babies. I'm also more confident that these can be kept cleaner than a typical toothbrush due to being made of silicone because the last thing you want is to spread more bacteria around! Would definitely buy these again when they wear out, but they seem durable enough that they will last for years.

reviews.title: Great for hard brushers
reviews.text: I tend to brush pretty hard and my gums do not appreciate that. These are soft enough that if I get over zealous my gums don't complain but my teeth still get clean.

reviews.title: Feel-Good Brush
reviews.text: I like that it cleans well.  I don't like that the brush bends away from the handle.

reviews.title: Bought for guest bath.
reviews.text: These are for guest bath. Just in case guests forget their toothbrush

reviews.title: Great for me.
reviews.text:
These are great for me! I've gotten better over the years, but I still tend to beat up and flatten toothbrushes by brushing too hard. These might help you to be conscious of that and calm down a little bit, but if you're really bent on brushing too hard, then they'll just give you hand cramps, since now you have to push harder and at an angle. ...hopefully they'll whip you into shape.

Even if you don't have that problem, they're good solid brushes. They seem to last a while and they leave my mouth feeling clean. I like the simpler heads like this, rather than all those weird newfangled things with all the plastic in them.

reviews.title: Nice For Medium Bristles
reviews.text: I like these toothbrushes. I prefer Soft bristles, but sometimes I want a deeper cleaning so the medium bristles are good for that on occasion. The overall design is nice, and I do feel like it keeps you from brushing too hard with the way it can flex and the bristle placement—it’s enough to get your teeth clean and it’s not so harsh and abrasive compared to some other brushes. It’s still a medium brush, so if you’re sensitive, stick with soft.

title: Oral-B Pulsar Battery Toothbrush With Charcoal Infused Bristles, Soft
description: Oral B Pulsar charcoal infused toothbrush is battery operated to gently vibrate and polish away stains for a whiter, cleaner smile. Using the same technique to brush as a manual toothbrush, The bristles vibrate providing a gentle massaging and polishing action while brushing. The bristles penetrate between teeth where stain build-up often begins. Pulsar has soft vibrating bristles that help break up plaque between teeth. Plus, the split head design moderates the amount of pressure applied to your teeth and gums. Contouring to your unique smile, The Pulsar toothbrush will leave your smile bright and clean with every use.
features: You will receive 1 Oral-B Pulsar battery toothbrush with charcoal infused bristles, battery included
The Charcoal infused bristles gently vibrate to effectively clean plaque and remove surface stains for whiter teeth
Penetrates deep between teeth and hard-to-reach areas of the mouth to sweep away plaque and stains caused by Food
Adjusts to the contours of your teeth and moderates the pressure applied to your teeth and gums
Oral-B is the #1 dentist-recommended toothbrush brand worldwide

reviews.title: Hello OralB
reviews.text: It’s an Oral-B.  I prefer this brand and hopped on the charcoal type at the advice of my former dentist.  She recommended.

reviews.title: Weak vibration
reviews.text: Not the best

reviews.title: Great Product!
reviews.text: Great Product!

reviews.title: Great toothbrush!
reviews.text: I always use the Oral B battery toothbrushes - I’m over 80, with my original teeth, and this toothbrush has kept me in good shape for years.  I like that they remind me to get a new about every three months.  The charcoal one helps to keep my teeth as white as they can be at this age - no taste involved - just mixes with your toothpaste and it does a great job.  I also find that this toothbrush brushes my gums, too, and I have not had any bleeding gums in years.  This is the only toothbrush I will buy.

reviews.title: Clean Those Teeth
reviews.text:
I love this electric tooth brush, by Oral-B as it is so different from ones I have tried before. I thought I would have to insert the battery but to my surprise it was already inserted and ready to be used. It was so easy and the button you need to push is clearly marked with a + so you push that and you are ready to add toothpaste and brush away. Just push the – sign and it stops. That was so easy and fast and you got a good brushing of your teeth. The bristles are charcoal infused bristle and this adds to completely clean your teeth and makes them feel clean.

I am wondering what one has to do if battery is used up as could not figure out where to change a battery. There was not that much explanations but I am enjoying the use of this great Oral-B for a great battery tooth brush. Great way to start the day with an Oral-B electric tooth cleaning.

reviews.title: Best of the Philips brushes
reviews.text:
I've been using Sonicare for 20 years and I find these A3 heads do the best at cleaning my teeth. The C3 are not too far behind, and the C1 are not far behind those. I just use the old rubbing the tongue on my teeth technique, but with the A3, I seem to go longer before I feel like I need a teeth cleaning at the dentist.
I've also used multiple 3rd party heads and none of them even come close to cleaning like the Philips heads. It's just too bad these things are so expensive, I'll probably stick to the C1 heads unless I see the A3 heads go on sale.

reviews.title: My hygienist noticed a difference!
reviews.text: Used to use the C3s. They are smaller and a bit less comfortable to use than this variant. The main winning point is that my hygienist said "what are you doing differently, your mouth looks way better than usual." I take that as an endorsement, and will continue to use these!

reviews.title: It’s a brush head
reviews.text: It’s a brush head

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: These are great toothbrush heads and fit my sonicare perfectly. Cleans teeth well. Would recommend.

reviews.title: Overpriced vs C2
reviews.text: I don’t know what a $15 replacement brush head needs to do to earn 5 stars but this just doesn’t blow me away. I typically buy the C2 replacements, I’ve also used C1 and C3. This is comparable to C3 it’s soft and gives a good clean. I can tell a difference between this and C1 or C2 but when I was using even C1 (which feels harder and I don’t like this one as much C2 is my go to) I didn’t have a cavity and my dentist said I was looking good. I do like that this head tells me when to swap out (C1 doesn’t) but $15 for a replacement is steep considering my toothbrush was $30. I will say after my second root canal I made the switch to a Phillips soniccare and since switching to sonic care from a traditional toothbrush I haven’t had any cavities. So I think using the soniccare with whatever heads you can afford is great for your dental health!

reviews.title: Works great with my sonicare
reviews.text: Works great and a good price . Good purchase, very happy with them

reviews.title: A Great Replacement
reviews.text: I'm not sure which model toothbrush I have, only that it's pretty basic and several years old, but still going strong. These brush heads are a perfect fit and work just like the brand name. I did find these to be a bit larger than the one I replaced, and the bristles were a bit longer, so it just felt bigger in my mouth overall. That being said, the bristles on these are softer and I find them to be gentler on my sensitive gums, even with the bigger brush size. Each brush has a colored dot (4 different colors) to differentiate between them if necessary. Overall, I'm happy with these.

reviews.title: Good affordable ootion
reviews.text: These brush heads are a good replacement option at an amazing price.

reviews.title: Works well for my Philips Sonicare 4100
reviews.text: This 8-pack of replacement brush heads for several Philips sonicare rechargeable toothbrush models fits my Sonicare 4100 perfectly. Popped on smoothly with no weird gaps. These are a larger size compared to the small Phillips diamond head style that I have been using and I've included a photo of a comparison showing this new replacement and the Philips sonicare branded brush side by side. I was worried they wouldn't be soft, but they are and I'm pleased with the bristles. After using for a week, I am glad I tried them and wouldn't hesitate to continue to use these and save some money.

reviews.title: Soft bristles
reviews.text:
I was running low on my Sonicare heads so I decided to give these a try, excited because they are a fraction of the cost of the name brand kind, especially for a package of 8.

They fit the handle just fine, but they aren’t chip-enabled to work with the automatic brush change reminder light on several Sonicare handles. So like regular toothbrushes you have to keep track of when you need to change it again.

I put my old ready-to-be-changed head back on immediately, as these bristles aren’t even close to “medium” hardness. They are SOFT. My old head has much stiffer-bristles than this new one, which I prefer.

I gave it a 2 rating because they do work for my Sonicare brush handle just fine, but they don’t work for me personally. If you need soft for sensitive gums, then these are for you.

You can’t go wrong with the Gum Care setting and these replacement heads if you need soft bristles. For the price, a pack of 8 is a steal!

They just aren’t for me, they are way too soft, I’m bummed.

reviews.text:
these tooth brushes are so pretty. the heads are dwarfed by the handles, but the heads are the perfect size for my mouth and the handles are the perfect size for my hands, so no complaints. been using one for the last two days, with charcoal toothpaste and tooth powder. the black bristles make it a bit harder to see when the brush is totally cleaned after brushing, but not so much that it's a problem.

the bristles are great and leave my mouth feeling squeaky clean, but I wish the heads were replaceable because the carved handles are amazing. extremely comfortable, too. I'll definitely start a collection as the bristles die, then (after sawing off the heads) sand them down and use them for something decorative. they're far too pretty to toss in the garbage.

ever since discovering bamboo fabrics a couple of years ago I've been on a bamboo kick for any and everything possible. it's long been one of my favorite plants (and the first thing I planted here at my home), and that it's sustainable/environmentally friendly has made it my go-to. hadn't even considered that there might be toothbrushes made of bamboo, but the minute I saw them I grabbed them. HIGHly recommended. bamboo is the wave of the future!

title: Better & Better Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for Adults | Rechargeable Electric Toothbrush | Replaceable Bamboo Brush Heads w/Soft, Plant-Based Bristles | 5 Cleaning Modes & Long-Lasting Battery
features: A Cleaner Clean and Brighter, Whiter Smile - Improve your brushing routine with Better & Better’s Bamboo Sonic Toothbrush for adults equipped with soft, natural, plant-based bristles made from castor bean oil. Our sonic toothbrush produces up to 38,000 microvibrations per minute for high polish and gentle clean. Choose from its 5 cleaning modes depending on your brushing needs.

Smart, Seamless & More Powerful Cleaning - Our bamboo electric toothbrush for adults features a 2-minute dentist-recommended timer with 30-second interval pulses. Flaunt your unique smile with the help of the sonic toothbrush's 5 cleaning modes: cleaning (default) for removing plaque, whitening for improving surface color, polishing mode for brightening your front teeth, milder for gentle gum massage, and sensitive for a super gentle mode for sensitive teeth and gums.

A Better Brushing Routine - The bamboo sonic toothbrush’s cleaning modes and plant-based bristles are safe to use on braces and dental restorations (fillings, crowns, veneers, or implants). Our electric toothbrush for adults is certified cruelty-free and comes in recyclable packaging.

Designed for Optimal Brushing Experience - Our bamboo electric sonic brush comes with replaceable bamboo heads. The entire brush is waterproof, so you can use it in the shower. The long-lasting and rechargeable battery also makes this the perfect travel toothbrush to keep your routine tip top on the go. You only need to charge it every 30-40 days when your routine consists of brushing twice, morning and night.

Better for You. Better for the Planet - We set out to make toothbrushes that are good in every way. Our unique natural bamboo brush heads create less waste when replaced. We prioritize the health of our bodies and our planet, which leads us to imagine entirely new ways of doing things. And as we minimize the ecological effects of our products and packaging, we create a better world.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush ever.
reviews.text:
I’ve used Sonicare Diamondclean for years - but after trying this one, I’ll never go back. It’s gentler, cleans better, and less than half the price of Diamondclean. I love the bamboo, the soft bristles. The only thing I wish it had two buttons (one for on/off, one for the settings), and a wireless induction charging base.
But as is I still love it.

reviews.title: Bamboo sonic toothbrush
reviews.text:
Good, sonic (vibrations rather than spinning) toothbrush. I am sure it helps clean better than a manual one, but I would prefer a spinning head for myself. It comes with only 2 replacement heads which deducts a star as I expect at least 4. It does comes with a toothbrush holder stand to recharge with a 30-40 day battery life. Many of these brushes only come with a ubs cable, so the included toothbrush holder is a great addition. Has a 2 minute timer as well as 5 cleaning modes. This toothbrush is unique as it is made with bamboo making it a more natural product!

title: mushie Baby Finger Toothbrush (Tradewinds/Stone) 2-Pack

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

reviews.title: Clean Teeth &Gums
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

Love these toothbrush covers! The pastel colors are appealing and smooth feeling. Fits great over my electric toothbrush. A little expensive, but they’ve been worth it!

Will be buying more for replacements in the future.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect for any size tooth brush we own.

reviews.title: I prefer the flip top ones after trying these; these sometimes fly out of my fingers
reviews.text:
There are six claw-type toothbrush holders in this package. The colors are muted but nice. However, after trying these, I prefer the flip top holders better because they are more streamlined, have an air vent for drying the brush, and are easier to operate.

These look nice on the brush but there is no air vent. The only air circulation is through the bottom hole through which the handle feeds through. Also, the act of opening the clip is cumbersome. Sometimes these almost want to fly out of my hand. In addition, they flop around on the top of the brush and take up more space. For instance, if I had a six-toothbrush holder and wanted to cover the top of every brush, I really could not do that successfully with these because they are top large and would be hitting into each other.

Nevertheless, these do what they are supposed to do except they are not my favorite.

The current price of $17.99 is an expensive $3 per holder.

reviews.title: Expensive for what they are, but handy and easy to use
reviews.text:
I've bought travel clips like these in the past that were similar to these. They're pretty much tiny enclosed hair clips that go over your toothbrush. These are more compact than others I've used so they're pretty secure on the toothbrush and don't move around in my toiletries bag. They may dent your brush's bristles of you have a larger brush.

There isn't much to these, they are sturdy and cute, but I do think they're pretty pricy for what they are. Granted, you do get 6 in the pack and would likely not have to repurchase them if you don't lose them.

reviews.title: Fit our electric toothbrush heads well

title: Kank-A Soft Brush Tooth Mouth Pain Gel Maximum Strength, White, 0.21 Oz, Pack of 3
description: Kank-A SoftBrush is the first oral pain treatment to deliver medication in a unique, self-contained brush-tipped dispenser. The sleek, pen-like applicator makes it easier than ever to comfortably and precisely target pain - including between teeth and braces. The no-drip, ultra-soft brush applies the pain-relieving gel evenly and directly to sore areas, with a comfortable touch that won't irritate or aggravate the area. SoftBrush delivers medication in a mild, pleasant tasting gel to treat pain caused by toothaches and minor irritation of the mouth and gums, including irritation from braces, dentures and other orthodontic appliances. The dual relief formula contains a maximum strength anesthetic combined with an active oral astringent for fast, effective relief.

reviews.title: Love!
reviews.text: Great value for the price, quantity, and quantity. Exactly what you’d get if you purchased in store. Helps with pain! Especially helps with pain from wisdom teeth. It does wear off, but I just reapply. FOLLOW THE DIRECTIONS! Do not keep reapplying more than what is recommended!

reviews.title: This works for numbing
reviews.text: This really relieves the pain, at least for awhile.  I don't think it works so much to heal but no pain is a good thing.

reviews.title: Gets inbetween teeth well.
reviews.text: I tried it for my teeth pain, turns out i have Trigeminal neuralgia and im just feeling pain in my teeth, i gave it to my brother for his tooth pain, he ended up coming back for the other two (i ordered 3) works great. Gets in those hard to reach places.

reviews.title: Totally worth the price/for best results...dry your canker before applying gel
reviews.text:
I suffer from Canker sores all the time. I get them so bad, it hurts to even speak.
My sister actually turned me on to Kank-A Tooth/Mouth Pain Gel,. It really works.
Of course I had to figure out how to use it in a way that better suits me.
Best Way to use it: When you feel that canker coming on in your mouth....dry that area as much as possible. Use either a cotton ball or a tissue to dry the surface area where the sore is. The dryer the spot, the better contact you can make with the Kank-A SoftBrush Tooth/Mouth Pain Gel, Apply the gel directly to your canker sore and give it a little time to actually start drying on the sore. Sometimes you do have to sit there with your tongue out- but if you want to treat it fast and get the gel into the sore better, its worth it. Once the gel is pretty much set in, you can go back to your normal routine. You will have to reapply it a few times a day.
For the best maximum treatment and results, put it on your Canker right before going to sleep. The gel will have time to work its magic while you sleep...totally recommend using this.

reviews.title: Works great but not for long
reviews.text: It does numb the pain at first but doesn't last as long as the beads.  Maybe that's not the point... maybe it shouldn't last too long... it's a numbing agent.

title: evowera Smart Manual Toothbrush Age 9+, Uncleaned Area Reminder, Pressure Reminder, Coaching App, Timer, Color Display, WiFi Compatible, Soft Bristle, Message Function, BPA Free, Kids Toothbrush, Blue

【Pressure Reminder Protects Kids Gums】Kids don't know they're brushing too hard? This smart toothbrush will notice and remind them by real-time vibration and flashing screens. A great manual toothbrush that helps your kids brush better and protects teeth and gums.

【Smart App for Tracking And Guidance】Parents can track the kids' brushing reports from the smart toothbrush and know whether they brushing thoroughly and for enough time. It will also generate daily, weekly, monthly, and annual personalized guidance to help kids maintain good oral hygiene practices.

【WiFi Compatible for Fun Interaction】Our smart toothbrush supports WiFi connection, you can track kids' brushing performance anytime and anywhere via the internet even if you're not at home. You can also send a fun message to the toothbrush to encourage kids to become better brushers.

【Safe, Ultra-Soft & Ergonomic for Kids】Our smart toothbrush is free from BPA, so it's 100% safe for your kids. The ergonomic handle and ultra-soft bristle can let kids grip the manual toothbrush easily and feel ultra comfortable while brushing.

reviews.title: The more data the better!
reviews.text: A smart toothbrush is an excellent idea! It works and there isn’t enough data when it comes to tooth brushing. It’s helpful to know exactly where to focus, excellent idea for kids. The app works and is easy to find.

reviews.title: Great child toothbrush
reviews.text: Love this idea but hate having my phone or childs phone near the sink or water. love the encouraging messages and timers to ensure its the best!

reviews.title: Useless don’t buy
reviews.text: This thing is useless.

reviews.title: Pretty cool motivator for kids
reviews.text:
As the product is named, it's a manual toothbrush, so just be sure you're not expecting anything electric here. It still does involve technology as the toothbrush has a display that yields information, such as how long you've been brushing and other messages on your performance. The real feature though is that the toothbrush has a blue sensor in it which you use to connect to an app which gets information on how long you brushed, which areas, if you pressed the brush too hard on your teeth or gums, etc., and spits out a brushing report.

We thought moving to an electric toothbrush would motivate our daughter to brush more a few years ago, and it did, but the results were limited. As she's 8, and at an age where she's really becoming a bookworm, she likes reading the brushing reports and it motivates her to brush herself.

As I said the brush is manual, and obviously the bristles will wear down with time, so the head of the brush is detachable and can be replaced for $3.50 for a set of 2 (price as of January 9, 2023). Obviously, you don't want to buy a whole new brush with technology in it every time the bristles get weaker.

I'm glad this one is getting my daughter to understand to brush correctly and she wants to do it regularly to see how she's doing.

reviews.title: Cool concept to make brushing fine, interactive, and technologically appealing!
reviews.text: This seems like a really neat way to keep track of and encourage brushing teeth. Bluetooth connects to phone and functions via the app you have to download, so in order to use and track, you need to be near the connected phone or tablet. Looking forward to setting it up for my niece to use when she visits.

title: Replacement Brush Heads Compatible with Oral B- Double Clean Design, Double Clean Brush Heads, Compatible with Braun Oral-B Dual Clean Electric Toothbrush (16-Pack)
description: Our Double Clean replacement brush head for rotary electric toothbrush features dual action for a superior clean vs a regular manual toothbrush. Its unique technology oscillates, allowing the bristles to surround each tooth for an amazing, tooth-by-tooth clean. Fits the following electric rechargeable toothbrush models: Oral-B Vitality Series: Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Sensitive Gum Care, Vitality Sensitive Clean, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Crossaction Oral-B Genius Series: Genius Pro 8000, Genius 9600, Genius X 10000, Genius X 10000 Luxe Edition Oral-B Smart Series Pro Series: Pro 500 Precision Clean, 550, 600, Pro 1000, Pro 1500, Pro 2000, Pro 3000, Pro 3250, Pro 4000, Pro 4750, Pro 5000, Pro 5500, Pro 6000, Pro 6500, Pro 7000, Pro 7400, Pro 7500, Pro 7550, Pro 7850, Pro 8000, Pro 8300, Pro 8500, Pro 8860, Pro 8875, Pro 8900, Pro 8950, 3D Excel, 3D Plaque Control Oral-B Triumph Professional Care Series: 9000, 9100, 9400, 9425, 9450, 9475, 9500, 9900, 9910, 9930, 9950 Oral-B Kids Pro Health Stages Power: Frozen, Princess, Finding Dory, Star Wars, Cars & Planes, Pro Health Jr. Frozen, Avengers, Mickey Mouse Oral-B Kids Electric Toothbrush with Coaching Pressure Sensor and Timer Oral-B Advance Power: 400, 450, 450TX, 800, 850, 900, 950, 950TX Oral-B Trizone: 600, 1000, 3000, 5000
features: FULL COMPATIBLIITY: Double Clean generic brushes are compatible with all genuine Oral-B electric toothbrushes, except Pulsonic, such as the Pro 500 1000 1500 3000 5000 6000 7000 8000, Pro-Health, White, Vitality and Triumph. [Please review the below listing for all compatible devices]

TOP QUALITY BRISTLES: Generic Double Clean replacement brush heads for Oralb– twice the cleaning action with 2 simultaneously moving brushes. The generic double clean brushes oscillate, rotate and pulsate, so that the bristles surround each tooth for a superior clean.
COLOR CODED: Each brush has a different color-coded identification ring so that you can share this set with the whole family.
16-PACK: Included 16pcs Dual Clean toothbrush heads allow you to replace at any time

INSTALL & CUSTOMER SATISFACTION: Just pull your old brush head and snap the new one on, easily and smoothly. If have any problem of them, just reach out to our customer service team (By contacting the seller in your order info), and we will work with you to ensure your satisfaction!
